title: Blackspur BB-TT117 20m*4mm Polypropylene Braided Rope on Reel
features: Strong and hard wearing braided rope
Ideal for home or garden use
description: Product Description Blackspur strong and hard wearing braided polypropylene rope is ideal for a variety of uses in the home or garden and comes packed on a handy plastic reel for easy use and storage. It has Approximate size: 20m by 4mm. Plastic reel with colour label packaging. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Rope
